tools.name: ping
tools.description: Connectivity check — returns server version and current timestamp. Use to verify MCP server is reachable before calling other tools.

tools.name: get_company_profile
tools.description: Returns 나라투어 core metadata — address, hours, specialties, contact channels. Use when the user asks about 나라투어 identity, lo to the model
tools.detail: Description of "ping" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Connectivity check — returns server version and current timestamp. Use to verify MCP server is reachable before calling other tools.

tools.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
